title: Cell
description: Spatial, spatio-temporal zone or temporal unit of geometry with dimensionality greater than 0, associated with a zone.

definitions.definition: Spatial, spatio-temporal zone or temporal unit of geometry with dimensionality greater than 0, associated with a zone.
definitions.notes: - Cells are the unit of geometry in a DGGS, and the geometry of the region of space-time occupied by a zone is a Cell.
